steps: Go to https://developer.intuit.com and sign in or create a free Intuit developer account
Navigate to the Developer Dashboard at https://developer.intuit.com/app/developer/dashboard
Select 'QuickBooks Online and Payments' as the platform
Enter your app name and select the scopes you need (e.g., com.intuit.quickbooks.accounting)
Go to 'Development Settings' > 'Keys & credentials' to find your sandbox Client ID and Client Secret
For production, complete the app assessment and go to 'Production Settings' > 'Keys & credentials'
notes: QuickBooks uses OAuth 2.0 — users must authorize your app to access their QuickBooks company
Sandbox environment is free and uses test company data; no real QuickBooks subscription needed for development
Each authorized user provides a 'realmId' (company ID) that must be included in all API requests
Access tokens expire after 1 hour; refresh tokens are valid for 100 days
Moving from sandbox to production requires completing an app assessment review by Intuit
